comment.body:
> @topherbuckley How do I explain to the bot that TFLiteInventory.md should be created and filled in the next PR?

@GeorgeChernyshov 
Use #codex-reply in the specific issue thread:
https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/pull/162#discussion_r2922079259

If your goal is to get an approval review from codex, don't worry about it so long as all the issues were resolved. No need to run it again. I can just bypass and merge in cases like this.
